_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: The amended Regulation (EU) 2019/1242, following the 2024 revision, applies not only to heavy lorries but also to medium lorries, city buses, coaches, and trailers. The regulation now covers vehicles of categories M₂, M₃, N₁, N₂, N₃ (provided vehicles do not fall under Regulation (EU) 2019/631), and O₃ and O₄.
prior.source_span: Following this revision, Regulation (EU) 2019/1242 covers nearly all HDV emissions as it applies not only to heavy lorries but also to medium lorries, city buses, coaches, and trailers.
